title: Drupal Extension Schema
description: Drupal CMS integration extension for OSSA agents. Maps OSSA manifests to Drupal's ai_agents module, Tool API, and ECA event system.

ai_agent_plugin.description: Plugin ID for the Drupal ai_agents module (e.g. 'ossa_agent')

tools.description: Drupal Tool API plugin IDs to grant this agent (e.g. 'tool:read:content_load')

eca_events.description: ECA (Event-Condition-Action) events this agent reacts to

permissions.description: Drupal permissions required for this agent to operate

content_types.description: Drupal content types this agent operates on

views_displays.description: Views displays to expose agent data

execution_model.description: How the agent is executed within Drupal. 'eca' uses Event-Condition-Action rules, 'ai-agent-runner' uses the ai_agents module runner, 'queue' defers to Drupal's queue system, 'direct' invokes synchronously.

drupal_version.description: Drupal core version constraint using Composer semver syntax (e.g. '^11' or '^11 || ^12')

php_version.description: Minimum PHP version required by this agent's Drupal integration

module_dependencies.description: Drupal contributed or core module machine names required for this agent to function

tool_plugins.description: Maps OSSA tool definitions to Drupal Tool API plugins. Each entry defines a Drupal tool plugin that wraps an OSSA tool reference, specifying the CRUD operation, input/output schemas, and whether the tool is callable by AI agents.

ossa_tool_ref.description: Reference to the OSSA tool definition in the agent manifest (e.g. 'tools/content_load' or a fully-qualified OSSA tool URI)

operation.description: The CRUD operation category this tool performs, aligning with Drupal's Tool API operation types

input_schema.description: JSON Schema defining the input parameters accepted by this tool plugin. Used by the Drupal Tool API for validation and by AI agents for parameter discovery.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema defining the output structure returned by this tool plugin. Used by the Drupal Tool API for response validation and by AI agents for result parsing.

ai_callable.description: Whether this tool can be invoked directly by AI agents via the Drupal AI module. When false, the tool is only available programmatically.

actions.description: Drupal Action plugin IDs provided or consumed by this agent (e.g. ECA actions, core actions)

conditions.description: Drupal Condition plugin IDs evaluated by this agent's ECA rules or access control

queue_workers.description: Drupal queue worker definitions for deferred or batch agent processing. Each worker processes items from a named queue on cron.

title.description: Human-readable title for this queue worker

cron_time.description: Maximum number of seconds this queue worker may run per cron invocation

blocks.description: Drupal Block plugin IDs provided by this agent for placement in page layouts and regions

recipes.description: Drupal recipes bundled with this agent. Recipes provide reusable configuration packages that can be applied to install content types, views, permissions, and module configuration in one step.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this recipe configures

install.description: List of module machine names or recipe names to install as part of this recipe

hooks.description: Drupal hook implementations provided by this agent's module. In Drupal 11+, hooks are implemented as class methods using the #[Hook] attribute.

hook_name.description: The hook name without the 'hook_' prefix (e.g. 'cron', 'entity_presave', 'install')

class_name.description: Fully-qualified PHP class name implementing this hook (e.g. 'Drupal\ossa_agent\Hook\EntityHooks')

method.description: Method name on the class that implements this hook

event_subscribers.description: Symfony event subscribers registered by this agent's module. Used for reacting to kernel, entity, and custom events in Drupal's event-driven architecture.

event.description: Fully-qualified event class name or event constant (e.g. 'Drupal\core\Entity\EntityEvents::PRESAVE' or 'kernel.request')

method.description: Method name on the subscriber class that handles this event

priority.description: Subscriber priority. Higher values mean earlier execution. Defaults to 0.

config_entities.description: Custom configuration entity types defined by this agent's module. Config entities store structured settings in Drupal's configuration management system.

label.description: Human-readable label for this config entity type

properties.description: JSON Schema-style property definitions for this config entity's fields. Keys are property names, values are objects with 'type' and 'description'.

description.description: Human-readable description of this config property
